name: .cursorrules — Full Stack Project
description: Cursor rules for full-stack TypeScript projects with Next.js, React, and Tailwind.
content:
# Cursor Rules — Full Stack Project

## Stack
- Next.js 15 App Router
- TypeScript strict mode
- React Server Components by default
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- tRPC for type-safe APIs

## Code Conventions
- Use functional components with hooks
- Prefer server components (default in app/)
- Client components only when needed ("use client")
- Co-locate components with their routes

## Styling
- Tailwind utility classes
- Use cn() helper for conditional classes
- Avoid inline styles

## Data Fetching
- Server components: fetch directly
- Client components: use tRPC hooks
- Handle loading and error states

## Important
- Never use getServerSideProps (App Router)
- Validate user input with zod
- Use env variables for secrets

name: .cursorrules — Python FastAPI
description: Cursor rules for Python FastAPI projects with async patterns and type safety.
content:
# Cursor Rules — FastAPI Project

## Stack
- Python 3.11+
- FastAPI for APIs
- SQLAlchemy 2.0 for ORM
- Pydantic v2 for validation
- Alembic for migrations

## Code Conventions
- Use async/await for all routes
- Type hints everywhere
- Pydantic models for request/response
- Dependency injection for database sessions

## API Design
- RESTful routes
- Proper HTTP status codes
- Pagination for list endpoints
- Include OpenAPI docs

## Database
- Use async SQLAlchemy
- Create migrations for schema changes
- Index foreign keys

## Testing
- pytest with async fixtures
- TestClient for integration tests
- Mock external services

name: .cursorrules — React Component Library
description: Cursor rules for building accessible React component libraries with Storybook.
content:
# Cursor Rules — Component Library

## Stack
- React 18+ with TypeScript
- Storybook for documentation
- Radix UI primitives
- Tailwind for styling

## Component Guidelines
- Composable, single-responsibility components
- Full TypeScript types (no any)
- Forward refs for all components
- Support className prop for extension

## Accessibility
- Semantic HTML
- ARIA labels where needed
- Keyboard navigation support
- Focus management

## Documentation
- Storybook story for each component
- Props table with descriptions
- Example usage in stories

## Testing
- Jest + React Testing Library
- Test accessibility with jest-axe
- Test keyboard interactions
